slides.descZh: 我们致力于前沿科学研究，探索创新性的解决方案，推动学术与应用的融合发展。
slides.descEn: We are dedicated to frontier scientific research, exploring innovative solutions and advancing the integration of academia and application.

slides.descZh: 聚焦核心科学问题，以跨学科方法推动理论突破与技术创新。
slides.descEn: Focusing on core scientific problems, driving theoretical breakthroughs and technological innovation through interdisciplinary approaches.

slides.descZh: 欢迎优秀的博士后、研究生和本科生加入，共同探索科学前沿。
slides.descEn: We welcome outstanding postdocs, graduate and undergraduate students to join us in exploring the frontiers of science.
